name: texture_real_skin
prompt: {prompt}, hyperreal skin texture, visible pores, subsurface scattering, natural imperfections, microscopic skin detail
negative_prompt: plastic skin, smooth airbrushed, porcelain, waxy

name: texture_film_grain
prompt: {prompt}, organic film grain, 35mm Kodak stock texture, subtle noise pattern, analog emulsion character
negative_prompt: digital clean, noise-free, smooth digital, plastic

name: texture_metal_wet
prompt: {prompt}, wet metallic surface texture, water droplets, reflective sheen, oxidation patina, liquid metal gloss
negative_prompt: dry matte, dull surface, flat metal

name: texture_fabric_weave
prompt: {prompt}, detailed fabric weave texture, visible threads, micro-fiber detail, textile microstructure, cloth surface realism
negative_prompt: smooth plastic fabric, flat textureless cloth

name: texture_weathered_patina
prompt: {prompt}, weathered patina surface, aged materials, oxidation, worn edges, environmental aging, textured decay
negative_prompt: pristine new, factory fresh, untouched surface

name: texture_glass_translucent
prompt: {prompt}, translucent glass material, refraction, caustics, subsurface light transmission, frosted surface detail
